content.en:
"Senior, I obtained these Yunwei Golden Fruits from the Kunxu Land. "

Ye Tian came to the mysterious woman, took out these Yunwei Golden Fruits, and handed them to the mysterious woman.

"Yunwei Jinguo, it's very good!"

The mysterious woman smiled slightly, in a good mood, and took over these Yunwei ~ Jinguo.

With these Yunwei Golden Fruits, she could gradually recover from her injuries, otherwise it would be too difficult to recover from her injuries in an environment like the Spell Spirit Gold Vein.

"Very good, you brought me the Yunwei Golden Fruit, and I won't treat you badly. Well, I'll give you a chance. "

The mysterious woman's words made Ye Tian a little excited.

The opportunity given by the peak of the eighth realm is definitely not an ordinary chance.

"You are now in the seventh realm, and you are still cultivating the innate multi-dimensional Dao body, the innate multi-dimensional Dao body you have cultivated at present is no longer useful, even if you cultivate dozens of innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, you will not be able to make your body strength stronger, and the dimensional body has reached a certain limit. If you want to continue to grow your physical strength, you must cultivate the dimensional domain body!"

The mysterious woman said.

Dimensional domain body?

Ye Tian heard it for the first time, and he was a little curious.

"Senior, what is a dimensional domain body?"

Ye Tian asked.

The mysterious woman said: "The cultivation threshold of the dimensional domain body is the thirty-six dimensional rules, and the dimensional domain must be condensed in the body, so only a very small number of seventh realms are qualified to cultivate the dimensional domain body. Once you have cultivated the dimensional domain body, even if you stand still, the ordinary seventh realm will not be able to move you. "

"Predecessors have dimensional domain body inheritance?"

Ye Tian was excited.

"Naturally, there is!" the mysterious woman waved her hand, and the inheritance of the Dimensional Domain of a Gate Gate appeared.

"Thirteen Dimensional Domain Body Inheritance!"

Ye Tian carefully looked at the inheritance of these dimensional domains, and browsed silently, observing the advantages and disadvantages of the inheritance of these dimensional domains.

In the end, he chose one of the dimensional domain inheritances.

The Primordial Domain!

"The Primal Domain Body is very good, once you practice it, you can also have a Domain Body Secret Technique - the Primordial Arrival. The Primal Advent refers to the projection of a special star in the sixteenth dimension, the Primal Star, which can comprehend the rules of the higher dimension, but unfortunately the price paid for the performance of this secret technique is too great, and if it is used for a long time, the physical body will be eroded by the Primal Star, and even assimilated, and finally become a part of the Primordial Star. "

"If you are cultivating this Primordial Realm, you have to be careful not to cast the Primordial Arrival. The mysterious woman reminded.

"Senior, I'm clear!"

Ye Tianying said.

Subsequently.

The mysterious woman passed on the primordial domain body to Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian accepted the inheritance of the Primal Domain Body, and was immediately attracted by the Primal Domain Body, and he couldn't wait to immediately cultivate the Primal Domain Body.

According to the cultivation requirements of the primordial domain body inheritance, the thirty-six dimensional rules can be cultivated, the seventy-two dimensional rules can be cultivated, and the one hundred and eightfold dimensional rules can be cultivated.

If you want to complete the cultivation of the Primal Domain Body, you must master the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions.

At present, Ye Tian was only able to get started with the cultivation of the Primal Domain Body.

The mysterious woman gave Ye Tiantai the inheritance of the primordial domain body, and she also wanted to quickly improve his strength, so that he could get more healing things.

Ye Tian also knew the other party's thoughts, but this was indeed his chance.

After obtaining the Primal Domain Body, Ye Tian left here and went back to cultivate the Primal Domain Body.

It is very difficult to cultivate the Primordial Domain Body, and the time, energy, and trial and error required to succeed are very high, and once the cultivation fails, it will take a long time to repair.

The mysterious woman was also able to hold on for a long time because she had obtained some Yunwei Golden Fruits, and she was not afraid that Ye Tian would not be able to collect healing things for him for the time being because of her injury.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian began to cultivate the Primal Domain Body, mobilized the rules of the thirty-six dimensions, and then cooperated with the Dimension Domain in the body to transform his body, and cultivated step by step according to the cultivation method of the Primordial Domain Body.

However, the mysteries contained in it are too complicated, and even with the assistance of treasures such as multi-dimensional wisdom light and silver mystical illustrations, it is still difficult to succeed in cultivating at one time.

Really.

At the last critical moment, Ye Tian made a slight mistake, which directly led to the failure of his cultivation and the heavy damage to his body.

Subsequently, he changed into a duplicate body and continued to cultivate the Primal Domain Body.

The second time he cultivated, he still failed, but it was much better than the first time.

Originally, he thought that the third time would fail, but Ye Tian succeeded.

Rumble!!!!!!!

Countless external energies poured into the body, helping Ye Tian quickly improve his physical fitness, and allowing Ye Tian's body to complete the qualitative evolution, reaching another level.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian's primordial domain has been completely formed.

Then, he replaced the other replica bodies all over again, and they all became the primordial domain body.

"It's too powerful, I can easily kill my past self now, this is the terrifying nature of the dimensional domain body!" Ye Tian said darkly.

After cultivating the Primal Domain Body, Ye Tian wanted to see the Primordial Arrival.

Thereupon.

He began to perform the secret technique of the Primal Realm.

Rumble!!!!

The primordial advent was successful, and the heavy dimensions were peeled off little by little by the invisible force, and finally he saw the primordial star of the sixteenth dimension.

The Primordial Star was too grandiose, too powerful, and a wisp of breath seemed to be able to penetrate everything, and could easily wipe him out countless times.

But at this moment, he observed a trace of the great power of the primordial star, and his understanding of the dimensional rules became more thorough.

But at this moment, the power of the Primordial Star penetrated, and even spread through this body to other replicating bodies.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian directly annihilated this replica body and disconnected it from the other replica bodies, so that it did not affect the other replica bodies.

"Sure enough, the power level of this primordial star is too high, and my other copy bodies are still affected!" Ye Tian said helplessly.

However, he did not give up on the Primordial Star.

If he can comprehend the Primal Star for a long time, his dimensional rules will improve faster.

As for how to circumvent the influence of the Primal Star, he also thought of it, that is, to continue to cultivate the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique.

Because the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique is a celestial body that observes the eighteenth dimension, although the sixteenth to eighteenth dimensions belong to the upper dimension, there is no essential distinction between high and low.

However, if the Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique is cultivated to the extreme, it can definitely shield the power of the Primal Star, and it will not affect the death of other replicas.
